2d:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Encryption"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne provides ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"optional, first-class client-side encryption"}]," for sync payloads. When enabled, memory content is encrypted before it leaves your machine and can only be decrypted by instances holding the same key."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Data at Rest"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["All data is stored in a local SQLite file (",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db"}],"). Mnemosyne does not encrypt the database file at rest — this is delegated to your OS:"]}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Layer"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Data"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Security"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recent agent context, preferences, facts"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Plaintext in SQLite. File permissions control OS-level access."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Episodic memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Consolidated long-term memories, vector embeddings"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Same. Embeddings are mathematical vectors, not reversible to original text."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Temporal knowledge graph (subject-predicate-object triples)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Same."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Config"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"API keys, endpoints, encryption settings"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Stored in environment variables or config.yaml. Never logged or transmitted."}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recommendations:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"chmod 600 ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db"}]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Full-disk encryption (LUKS, FileVault, BitLocker)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Memory bank isolation for shared machines: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne --bank <name>"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Data in Transit (Sync)"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["When ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne sync"}]," is enabled, memory content travels between instances over HTTP/HTTPS."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Without Client-Side Encryption"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"What the remote server sees"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Example"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Memory content (plaintext)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\"User prefers dark mode\""}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Importance scores"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.9"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Memory type / source"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"\"preference\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"cli\""}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Event metadata"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"event_id"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"timestamp"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"device_id"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"operation"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector embeddings"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Opaque binary (not reversible to text, but similarity-analysis possible)"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Protection:"}]," TLS encryption between instances. Recommended: reverse proxy (Caddy, Nginx, Traefik) with automatic HTTPS."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":["With Client-Side Encryption (",["$","code",null,{"children":"--encrypt"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"What the remote server sees"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Example"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Memory content"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"Encrypted::<base64 ciphertext>"}]," (unreadable without the key)"]}]]}],"$L3","$L4","$L5","$L6"]}]]}],"\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29"],["$L2a"],"$L2b"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"D65-DGFZ3wussYS9_Hf9h"}
3:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Importance scores"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Encrypted alongside content"}]]}]
4:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Memory type / source"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Encrypted alongside content"}]]}]
5:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Unencrypted metadata"}]," (required for routing)"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"event_id"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"timestamp"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"device_id"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"operation"}]]}]]}]
6:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector embeddings"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Encrypted as part of payload"}]]}]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Protection:"}]," Authenticated encryption via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"cryptography.fernet.Fernet"}]," (AES-CBC) or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nacl.secret.SecretBox"}]," (XSalsa20-Poly1305). The remote server cannot decrypt any payload content."]}]
8:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Client-Side Encryption in Detail"}]
9:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"How It Works"}]
a:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"┌─────────────────────┐           ┌─────────────────────┐\n│   Local Instance    │           │   Remote Instance   │\n│                     │           │                     │\n│  1. Encrypt payload │  ──────►  │  3. Store encrypted │\n│     with local key  │  (TLS)   │     payload as-is   │\n│                     │           │                     │\n│  4. Request changes │  ◄────── │  2. Return encrypted │\n│  5. Decrypt payload │  (TLS)   │     payloads         │\n│     with local key  │           │                     │\n└─────────────────────┘           └─────────────────────┘\n"}]}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"The encryption key never leaves the local instance. The remote instance stores and serves encrypted payloads without ever decrypting them."}]
c:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Encryption Backend"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"SyncEncryption"}]," tries these backends in order:"]}]
e:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"cryptography.fernet.Fernet"}]}]," — AES-128-CBC with HMAC-SHA256 (requires ",["$","code",null,{"children":"cryptography>=41.0"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"nacl.secret.SecretBox"}]}]," — XSalsa20-Poly1305 (requires ",["$","code",null,{"children":"PyNaCl>=1.5"}],")"]}],"\n"]}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":["Install either with: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[sync]"}]]}]
10:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Key Sources"}]
11:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Source"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Configuration"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Where Supported"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Environment variable"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_KEY=<base64-key>"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Core ",["$","code",null,{"children":"SyncEncryption"}],", Hermes adapter"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"File path"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"--encrypt /path/to/keyfile"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"CLI, Hermes adapter"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Raw key string"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"--encrypt <base64-key>"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"CLI, Hermes adapter"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"OS keyring"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_KEY_SOURCE=keyring"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hermes sync adapter only"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Prompt"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_KEY_SOURCE=prompt"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hermes sync adapter only"}]]}]]}]]}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":["Core ",["$","code",null,{"children":"SyncEncryption.from_config()"}]," reads from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"$$MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_KEY"}]," or a provided key source. The Hermes sync adapter supports additional sources through ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_KEY_SOURCE"}],"."]}]
13:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Key Derivation"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"SyncEncryption.derive_key()"}]," converts a passphrase to a 32-byte key:"]}]
15:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Default:"}]," PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256 with 600,000 iterations"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"If argon2-cffi is installed:"}]," Argon2id (memory-hard, recommended)"]}],"\n"]}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":["Note: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"from_config()"}]," does not currently call ",["$","code",null,{"children":"derive_key()"}]," — passphrases are not yet supported as a key source in core. Use a pre-derived key or the Hermes adapter for passphrase support."]}]
17:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Generate a random key\nmnemosyne sync generate-key\n# Output: MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_KEY=7A8B3C... (base64, 32 bytes)\n\n# Use with CLI\nmnemosyne sync --encrypt MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_KEY=7A8B3C...\nmnemosyne sync --encrypt /path/to/keyfile\n\n# Enable in Hermes (config.yaml)\nmnemosyne:\n  sync:\n    key: \"7A8B3C...\"\n    encrypt: true\n"}]}]
18:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"What Gets Encrypted"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"payload"}]," field of each sync event:"]}]
1a:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Memory ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," text"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}]," score"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," field"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata_json"}]," (if present)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"memory_type"}]," / ",["$","code",null,{"children":"veracity"}]," fields"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Vector embeddings (",["$","code",null,{"children":"binary_vector"}],")"]}],"\n"]}]
1b:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"What Stays Unencrypted (Metadata)"}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":"These fields are always plaintext (needed for routing and conflict resolution):"}]
1d:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"event_id"}]," — UUID"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"memory_id"}]," — References the memory row"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"operation"}]," — CREATE / UPDATE / DELETE / CONSOLIDATE"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"timestamp"}]," — ISO 8601"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"device_id"}]," — Which device originated the event"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"parent_event_ids"}]," — Causality chain"]}],"\n"]}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":["An adversary with access to the remote sync server can learn ",["$","em",null,{"children":"how many"}]," events and ",["$","em",null,{"children":"when"}],", but not their content."]}]
1f:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"CLI Commands"}]
20:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Command"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne sync generate-key"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Generate a random 32-byte base64-encoded key"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne sync --encrypt <key|file>"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Sync with encryption enabled"}]]}]]}]]}]
21:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Threat Model"}]
22:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"In Scope"}]
23:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Threat"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mitigation"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Remote server compromise -> memory content exposure"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Client-side encryption renders payloads unreadable"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"TLS interception (MITM)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TLS with certificate validation"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Unauthorized sync access"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"API key / JWT authentication on sync endpoints"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Replay attacks"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Unique event IDs + timestamp validation"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Sync of malicious content"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Destination-side content filtering via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ignore_patterns"}]]}]]}]]}]]}]
24:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Out of Scope"}]
25:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Threat"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Rationale"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Side-channel attacks on encryption timing"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Performance-sensitive sync makes constant-time hard. Use TLS for transit."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Quantum cryptanalysis of Fernet/SecretBox"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Not a practical threat for memory content. Key rotation mitigates long-term risk."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Physical access to the database file"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"OS-level controls (file permissions, disk encryption) are the user's responsibility"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Denial of service on sync endpoint"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Self-hosted deployments manage their own rate limiting"}]]}]]}]]}]
26:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Best Practices"}]
27:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Always use HTTPS/TLS"}]," for sync connections."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Enable client-side encryption"}]," when syncing over the internet or to a shared VPS."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Rotate sync keys periodically"}]," (every 90 days)."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Back up encryption keys"}]," separately from your Mnemosyne database. Losing the key means losing access."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Use environment-specific keys"}]," — separate keys for dev, staging, production."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Monitor sync events"}]," with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne sync status --remote <url>"}],"."]}],"\n"]}]
28:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Related"}]
29:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/operations/sync","children":"Sync Documentation"}]," — Full sync protocol, CLI usage, and deployment"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/security/overview","children":"Security Overview"}]," — Full security model, data protection, access control"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/getting-started/configuration","children":"Configuration"}]," — Environment variables and settings"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/security/access-control","children":"Access Control"}]," — Role-based permissions, API keys, scope restrictions"]}],"\n"]}]

2b:["$","$L2c",null,{"children":["$","$2d",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@2e"}]}]
